title: Milkyway Core
description: The Core-Mod for the Create: Milkyway modpack
body:
This is the core mod for the Create: Milkyway modpack. it adds quite a few items, blocks, fluids, features and tweaks to the game to improve the modpack. This mod requires some scripts in the main modpack, create, tinker's construct, and more.

The scripts remove recipes from the other mods this is used with to avoid duplicate recipes. This mod is technically playable without the scripts and mods in the main pack but tweaking recipes yourself is probably recommended.
